title: astragalus albispinus
intro: Astragalus albispinus is a perennial legume plant native to China, belonging to the pea family Fabaceae. It is also known as white-spined milk-vetch, and its roots have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties. The roots of Astragalus albispinus are valued for their adaptogenic properties, which help to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. Astragalus albispinus can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its health benefits.
